executor-api/package.json.summary: Package manifest describing a chatbot executor API with dependencies for Express, ESLint, CORS, and Nodemon, with scripts to start or run in development mode.

executor-api/server.js.summary: A Node.js/Express server that provides POST endpoints for syntax checking and linting JavaScript files with authentication via a token from environment variable RAILWAY_AUTH_TOKEN.

index.html.summary: HTML entry point for a 'Self-Recursive Bot' React application with mobile-responsive styles, import maps for React, ReactDOM, and Zustand libraries.

netlify.toml.summary: Netlify configuration defining build commands, deploy preview bypass, and edge function proxies for DeepSeek, OpenRouter, Firecrawl, LangSearch, executor, and GitHub token endpoints.

netlify/edge-functions/deepseek-proxy.js.summary: An edge function that proxies requests to the DeepSeek API, supporting streaming server-sent events or JSON responses.

netlify/edge-functions/executor-proxy.js.summary: An edge function that forwards POST requests to a Railway-based executor API, injecting authentication and route suffix.

netlify/edge-functions/firecrawl-proxy.j.summary: An edge function that proxies search requests to the Firecrawl API and returns formatted results with titles, URLs, and snippets.

netlify/edge-functions/github-token-prox.summary: An edge function that exposes the GITHUB_PAT environment variable via a GET request with optional CORS headers.

netlify/edge-functions/langsearch-proxy..summary: An edge function that proxies POST requests to the LangSearch web search API, forwarding authorization and body.

netlify/edge-functions/openrouter-proxy..summary: Netlify edge function that proxies requests to OpenRouter's chat completions API, handling authentication, streaming (SSE), and error responses.

netlify/inject-preview-bypass.js.summary: Build script that injects a JavaScript snippet into index.html during deploy-preview builds to bypass the login gate and show the app directly.

preferences.json.summary: JSON configuration file with editable preferences for a self-improving bot, including clarification prompts, planning rules, execution code style, and review strictness.

src/components/SimpleChat.js.summary: Main chat component that manages messages, tasks, and pending commands, integrating with workspace and provider stores for a self-improvement bot interface.

src/components/SimpleChat/Header.js.summary: Header component displaying the 'Self-Recursive Bot' branding, with responsive input fields for repository, branch, provider, and model.

src/components/SimpleChat/InputBar.js.summary: Input bar component with a text field and send button, supporting Enter key submission and responsive layout for mobile.

src/components/SimpleChat/MessageList.js.summary: Message list component that renders chat messages with user/agent styling, auto-scrolling, and responsive font sizes.

src/components/SimpleChat/TaskList.js.summary: Task list component displaying tasks with status indicators (DONE, FAILED, TODO) in a scrollable area with responsive layout.

src/components/SimpleChat/Toaster.js.summary: Toast notification component that displays a fixed-position message bar with error or success styling at the bottom of the screen.

src/core/SelfImprover.js.summary: Main orchestrator class for self-improvement runs, handling hierarchical task decomposition, persistent memory, dependency ordering, and LLM calls with timeout constraints.

src/core/WorkingMemory.js.summary: WorkingMemory accumulates all information gathered during an agentic run, storing file summaries (first 500 chars), notes, and building a compact context string for the LLM prompt.

src/core/agenticExecutor.js.summary: agenticExecutor executes a task using a read-before-write loop where the LLM can request to read additional files before producing the final code block, with all calls kept small to avoid timeout.

src/core/agenticPlanner.js.summary: agenticPlanner creates a plan by exploring candidate files in a codebase using iterative LLM-driven reads, then generating a plan with hierarchical sub-goal support.

src/core/chunkedIndexer.js.summary: chunkedIndexer builds a keyword index for large repositories by processing files in groups of 10, extracting keywords and summaries via fast LLM calls, then committing the index as keywords.json.

src/core/clarification.js.summary: clarification.js generates clarifying questions with a 30-second timeout; if the user doesn't respond, the original goal is used.

src/core/coordinatedPlanner.js.summary: coordinatedPlanner creates a multi-agent plan by grouping candidate files by top-level directory, launching parallel exploration agents per directory, and then merging summaries into a single plan via a coordinator agent.

src/core/fileDiscovery.js.summary: fileDiscovery discovers relevant files by scoring them against the goal using a keyword index or filename scan, returning the top matches with content.

src/core/hierarchicalPlanner.js.summary: hierarchicalPlanner extends planners by decomposing complex goals into sub-goals using an LLM decision, then building a hierarchical plan with dependencies and task queue.

src/core/keywordIndexer.js.summary: keywordIndexer provides fuzzy matching of slash commands using exact, prefix, and Levenshtein-based scoring to find the best command match for a given input.

src/core/manifestManager.js.summary: manifestManager loads or builds a manifest.json from a repository, either fetching it from GitHub or constructing it from JavaScript source files in the file tree.

src/core/parallelExec.js.summary: Executes pending tasks in parallel up to a configurable concurrency limit, skipping tasks whose files are locked by other concurrent tasks, and marks each task as done or failed after execution.

src/core/persistentMemory.js.summary: Saves and loads working memory to/from the repo using run-scoped JSON files, with serialization/deserialization that preserves file summaries but omits full content to avoid bloat.

src/core/planner.js.summary: Generates a plan by querying an LLM with discovered file contents and goal context, returning JSON with a milestone title, analysis, and up to 4 tasks each specifying exact file paths to change.

src/core/prCreator.js.summary: Creates a GitHub pull request with a title derived from the goal (truncated to 60 characters) and returns the PR URL.

src/core/reviewer.js.summary: Reviews each completed task by fetching committed file content and using an LLM to verify correctness against the task description, returning PASS or ISSUES and updating task status accordingly.

src/core/taskQueue.js.summary: Manages task lifecycle with functions to initialize, query, and update task status (TODO, DONE, FAILED) in a centralized task queue within the context object.

src/main.js.summary: Sets up the main application by importing React components and services, initializing a SelfImprover instance with workspace and provider store state, and auto-loading a GitHub token from Netlify environment variables.

src/services/PreferencesService.js.summary: Loads and saves a preferences.json file to/from the repository with default values for clarification, planning, execution, and review settings, merging user preferences with defaults.

src/services/executorApi.js.summary: Provides methods to call linting, syntax checking, and health endpoints through a Netlify edge proxy, with fail-open behavior on network errors to avoid blocking commits.

src/services/github.js.summary: Implements GitHub API interactions for fetching file trees, loading file contents with base64 decoding, and committing multiple files in a single atomic operation using tree manipulation.

src/services/llmProvider.js.summary: LLMProvider is a centralized class for calling language models via Netlify edge proxies with a 20-second timeout, fast-model override, thinking mode, and reasoning effort support.

src/services/smokeTest.js.summary: SmokeTest polls a Netlify deploy-preview URL until it returns a healthy page with a root element or times out after 180 seconds.

src/stores/providerStore.js.summary: A persisted Zustand store managing language model provider settings including provider selection, model choice, thinking mode, and reasoning effort.

src/stores/workspaceStore.js.summary: A persisted Zustand store for workspace configuration including current repository, branch, GitHub token, and a remember-keys toggle.

src/utils/agentSkills.js.summary: processAgentSkills parses AI replies for update_editor and read_file skill tags, extracting code blocks and file paths while modifying the reply text.

src/utils/contextBuilder.js.summary: ContextBuilder identifies required files from a manifest by analyzing imports and imports-by, then builds a structured context string within a token budget.

src/utils/manifestBuilder.js.summary: ManifestBuilder constructs a dependency map from JavaScript files by extracting exports, imports, and computing reverse dependency links (importedBy).

src/utils/sandboxTest.js.summary: testCodeSandbox runs user code in a sandboxed iframe with preloaded modules and a configurable timeout, returning a health check result.

src/utils/stripComments.js.summary: stripComments removes block and line comments and blank lines from JavaScript/CSS code to reduce prompt size.
